description:
Write a SQL query that returns all users who: registered in the last 30 days, have the role 'user' (not 'admin' or 'viewer'), have placed at least one order. Use a JOIN with an orders table. Return columns: user_id, name, email, created_at, order_count. Order by order_count descending. Tables: users (id, name, email, role, created_at), orders (id, user_id, created_at).

Output ONLY the raw code. No explanations, no markdown formatting, no commentary. Just the code.
